item.arguments: Use $fw:polish on a newly built admin screen before code review.
success_definition: Uses headed browser feedback such as screenshots, snapshots, or console review.
Keeps the work moving toward review and commit.

item.arguments: Use $fw:polish on the account settings flow, but playwright-cli is not installed.
success_definition: Handles the missing browser tool cleanly.
Routes setup through /fw:setup browser or equivalent.
Does not claim polish proof without the tooling.

item.arguments: Use $fw:polish on a page that already had visual fixes and needs a final browser proof pass.
success_definition: Ends with /fw:browser-test or equivalent browser-proof closure.
Hands off to review and commit.
Keeps the polish loop tied to real proof.
